title: WorldEnd: What are you doing at the end of the world? Are you busy? Will you save us?
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode adaptation (Spring 2017) of Akira Kareno's light novel "Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka?" (SukaSuka). LN-based, so ranges are mapped by volume against the source's AniList NOVEL entry (id 87284), which reports 25 chapters across 5 volumes (5 chapters/volume). The anime adapts only volumes 1-3 (chapters 1-15); volumes 4-5 (chapters 16-25) of the original series were never animated, and the sequel SukaMoka series is unadapted. Per-volume episode boundaries are approximate — the anime condenses and re-weights the source toward Chtholly's perspective, and no episode-to-chapter guide exists, so splits are estimated at ~4 episodes per volume. Original LN series complete at 5 volumes; sequel SukaMoka complete at 11 volumes.
